generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving unresolved references reported by the AGREE validator.
Prioritize repairs that address type mismatches identified by the AGREE validator.
Use visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE contracts; avoid undefined identifiers.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Declare constants and equations (eq) within the `annex agree` block.
Use `int`, `real`, and `bool` for AGREE scalar type declarations.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce unqualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model.
Avoid modifying the AADL architecture to resolve AGREE validation errors; focus on contract adjustments.
Do not attempt to repair contracts referencing implementation-level details in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL scope rules for subcomponent ports
AADL structural extraction (component types, implementations, features, connections, properties, and owners)
